title: Supply Chain Manager - Zomato Logistics - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Zomato Logistics - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zomato Logistics! We are hiring a Supply Chain Manager for our Visakhapatnam team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zomato Logistics:
Zomato Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato Logistics!
